message:
fix(harness): correct REQUIRED_LOG_FIELDS count and owned-string insert in leapfrog criteria

Bump array length from 8 to 9 to match actual field count, switch
seen_workloads insert to owned String to fix lifetime issue, and
reformat chained iterator for readability.
